scope: 8 novel commands verified live against the production SendGrid API

evidence.suppression sync: no-flag default mirrors API state into local SQLite + emits valid JSON envelope
evidence.suppression diff: three-way diff (live API, local mirror, external CSV)
evidence.stats rollup: windowed rollups with WoW deltas; BUCKET/METRIC/VALUE/DELTA_ABS/DELTA_PCT column order
evidence.activity tail: Streamed live SendGrid Email Activity events with rate-aware polling (PropertyEngine newsletter msg_id family confirmed)
evidence.subusers rollup: fan-out concurrency 4; emits valid JSON envelope on empty result

additional_audit: Full-level dogfood matrix (874 tests, 95.2% pass) ran during Phase 5; the complete trace is preserved at .manuscripts/20260518-202518/proofs/dogfood-live.log. The 42 non-passing tests are environmental (account-permission edges where the CLI surfaces API errors correctly), spec-template scope, or framework-level JSON fidelity — none are novel-feature defects.
